```lean4
import Mathlib
import LTL
import LTL.Fix

theorem property_check :

  have main : Program := fun x y c => {

    y := __VERIFIER_nondet_int();

    while ((x == y) && (x > 0)) {
      while (y > 0) {

        y := y - 1;
        c := c + 1;
      }
    }
    return 0;
  }
  -- Define the initial state
  have init_main : LTL.Fix (init main) := by
    exact LTL.Fix.init main
  -- Verify the property
  exact LTL.LTL main (init_main) (LTL.G ! overflow)
```
